title: Make all website text white across all pages/sections

requirements.text: Update the frontend styling so that all visible text across the entire website renders in white, including (but not limited to) the Food Booths section/pages, Haunted Houses section/pages, Auditions section and dedicated Auditions page, and Scare Zones section/pages.

quotes: Make all the words for the food booths, haunted houses and auditions and scare zones and all words make color white

acceptanceCriteria: All headings, paragraphs, labels, and body copy on the home sections and all routed pages display as white text.
Auditions page banner text and fetched audition link text render in white.
Food booth detail pages (e.g., Slider Doom / Sharks Hell) render their titles, descriptions, menu text, and navigation text in white.
Scare zone and haunted house content text renders in white.
No backend changes are required for this styling update.

requirements.text: Do not change any background colors or background media (images/videos/gradients) as part of the white-text update; only adjust text color styling.
acceptanceCriteria: Background colors, overlays, and media remain visually the same as before the update (no intentional darkening/lightening or palette shifts).
Only text color is changed/overridden to white.

constraints: Frontend files under frontend/src/components/ui and the immutable hook/entry files listed in SYSTEM_CONTEXT must not be edited.
Backend must remain single-actor; no backend work is needed for this request.
nonGoals: Adding new pages, routes, or content.
Changing theme colors beyond text color (e.g., changing buttons, cards, or backgrounds).
Improving contrast or accessibility beyond making text white, since the user explicitly requested text-only changes.
